content: State-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory architectures can be repurposed to solve a core flaw of Intrinsic Curiosity Module (ICM) and Random Network Distillation (RND) curiosity-driven reinforcement learning: catastrophic forgetting of previously explored surprising states. By tiering episodic memory of novel discoveries into the active learning agent’s working long-term memory structure, curious agents can avoid re-exploring already-resolved surprising states and prioritize still-uncertain under-learned regions of the environment.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
